positive: A stylized, minimalist representation of a celestial river flowing through a stylized landscape. The river should be depicted using abstract, vibrant teal and deep violet inks, contrasting sharply against a matte navy blue background. Incorporate abstract, geometric constellations and stylized bioluminescent floral elements emerging from the river's banks. The composition must be highly symmetrical and centered, featuring clean, strong silhouettes suitable for screen printing or direct-to-garment transfer. High contrast, elegant line art aesthetic, graphic design composition, vector illustration quality, ambient cosmic lighting, perfect symmetry, centered subject.
